guiding_principle_decomposition_node.rationale: Per recursive doctrine + operator-approved 5TH-ORDER mechanism-fix per C-i 4TH-ORDER refutation: C-i empirically proved non-differentiable indicator (residual > 0) had ZERO chain-rule gradient back to residual parameters. THIS work replaces indicator with DIFFERENTIABLE soft proxy (tanh(k*r)+1)/2 which has gradient k*(1 - tanh^2(k*r))/2 NONZERO almost everywhere. Empirical adjudication: VALIDATED branch retroactively confirms 4TH-order mechanism diagnosis; REFUTED branch triggers 6TH-order architectural decomposition.

carmack_verdict_per_catalog_307: VARIANT_C_I_PRIME_SOFT_DIVERSIFIED_BYTES_FLAT: positive_fraction_soft moved (avg=0.4995; cells within +/-0.10 of 0.5 = 6/6) but Variant B-d sidecar bytes did NOT shrink below 157B baseline at any cell (min=166B). The soft proxy diversified internally but did not propagate to the HARD sign distribution empirically observed in the int8-clipped residuals. Investigate: deeper k sweep OR examine the gap between soft-distribution and post-clip-hard-distribution.
